context: Tests whether the agent uses pubnub.addListener with an objects handler, correctly switches on event.message.type (uuid/channel/membership) and event.message.event (set/delete), and subscribes to the object's own channel to receive events.

checklist.name: Uses objects handler
checklist.description: subscribeToMetadataEvents passes an objects: function to pubnub.addListener (not message:, not status:)

checklist.name: Switches on event.message.type
checklist.description: Inside the handler, code reads event.message.type and compares it against 'uuid', 'channel', and 'membership'

checklist.name: Switches on event.message.event
checklist.description: Inside the handler, code reads event.message.event and compares it against 'set' and 'delete'

checklist.name: Routes uuid events
checklist.description: Handler routes uuid+set to onUserSet and uuid+delete to onUserDelete with the event's data

checklist.name: Routes channel events
checklist.description: Handler routes channel+set to onChannelSet and channel+delete to onChannelDelete

checklist.name: Routes membership events
checklist.description: Handler routes membership+set to onMembershipSet and membership+delete to onMembershipDelete

checklist.name: watchUserChannels subscribes to userIds and channelIds
checklist.description: watchUserChannels calls pubnub.subscribe with channels: [...channelIds, ...userIds] (or equivalent combined array) so events on each object are received

checklist.name: Returns unsubscribe function
checklist.description: subscribeToMetadataEvents returns a function that removes the listener (e.g., via pubnub.removeListener) when called
